headline: McKesson Corp (NYSE:MCK) Q4 Earnings: Revenue Miss Weighs on Stock After Hours
summary: McKesson's Q4 earnings beat EPS estimates at $11.69 but missed revenue forecasts at $96.3B, causing shares to slip 2.5% after hours as investors weigh fiscal 2027 guidance.
